name: Lords of Gomoku
author: Poki
description: Lords of Gomoku is a puzzle and strategy board game, developed by Air Guslar, where the player has to get his pieces on a 5 in a row to win. Put your skills to the test and challenge the Lords of Gomoku in this puzzle game. Compete against your enemies on different and exciting boards, get 5 in a row before them, and crown yourself as the new champion. For even more fun, challenge a friend and play with them in the multiplayer mode! How to play: Use your mouse left click to select and place your pieces. About the creator: Lords of Gomoku is created by the Serbian developer Air Guslar. You can play their other game Gem 11 on Poki !
